## ✅ Checklist (Required)

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] Conventional commit message (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`)
- [ ] Docs / README updated if needed
- [ ] I added tests for new behavior

## 🧪 How to Test

```bash
npm test
npm run lint
```
